name: Revised Edition

draft.notes: Basic lands appear on the common and uncommon print sheets, so a land can take the place of a common or uncommon. No dedicated land slot. Pack ordering uncommon-rare-common.

sourceNotes: Also known as Third Edition. Sheet layouts similar to Beta/Unlimited. Sold in 15-card booster packs (36/box) and 60-card starter decks. No foils (pre-1999). Summer Magic ("Edgar") is a rare variant printing with unknown collation.
